headline: Mississippi Power names Meridian native Fredie Carmichael vice president of Customer Solutions and Corporate Communications
summary: Mississippi Power today announced its board of directors has elected Fredie Carmichael as vice president of Customer Solutions and Corporate Communications, effective March 16. Carmichael will also serve as a member of the company's management council.

headline: Soaring Power Prices Have US Politicians Searching for Solutions
summary: The Energy Department has loaned $26.5 billion — the most in its history — to help a big Southeastern utility reduce the cost of building new power plants in Georgia and Alabama.  Meanwhile, the nation’s biggest grid operator has proposed capping wholesale prices and some governors are weighing utility rate freezes as a way to keep a lid on electricity costs.  The affordability problem is prompting a White House meeting Wednesday with technology executives.

headline: Trump has an AI data center problem ahead of the midterms — with no easy solutions
summary: Grassroots opposition to data centers is growing in communities across the U.S. as people blame the facilities for high utility bills.
